counters.description: a lot of cc and tankiness, can carry teamfights hard. even early make sure your ganks and farm is better than his.
she bullies you early, you outscale hard
she beats you in any state of the game just try to avoid her and not fall too much behind, you outvalue her if you play your teamfights better
you hard lose early but outscale after 3 items
you get bullied early but if you dont fall much behind you can 1shot him if he doesnt have maw
you cant really ever 1v1 him and his teamfighting is also great but he isnt really a threat to ekko specifically
you lose hard early but your teamfighting is much better
you get perma invaded, you both have great scalings, if you dont fall behind much you can kill her late(unless she r then unlucky).
he stomps you early but you outscale hard
same case as elise ,you get bullied early but after 20 mins she cant kill you unless she hits her spear
you do no dmg to you, he 1 can kill you + he has tons of cc, broken champ
he beats you early a lot, mid game is even and you hard outscale late
if he is a good rengar you cant play the game until your 3 items, try to get fed from ganks and always be aware of his invades
same as jarvan but harder to deal with
you cant 1 shot her, but you outfarm her and can get ahead if played correctly
cant 1v1 him, hard to deal with late because he stacks mr and hp
cant 1v1 him but you outscale hard. play with your team
he hard beats you early, play with your team mid to late,
op af, tank with a lot of cc and dmg

synergies.description: great for jg/mid jg/top premades
best champion to play with ekko, her r and your w can make insane plays
great when paired together, huge side lane pressure and teamfight with her r and your w
her r and your w together are op
he can make you a beast, if youre fed you 2v8 easily since he enables your limit testing hard with his cleanse, shields and heals.
amumu support really helps you with his passive and r which can be followed by your w for insane cc.
nilah is my favourite adc to have on my team by far, her r can pull enemies into your w or even r + her w can be very useful to you because of its defensive capabilities.
really good because of his engage and his ability to upgrade your items since ekko is scaling of stats.
he allows you to limit test.
good cc, can enable good plays but enemies can counter you with mr anc mercs in general
